urdu transliteration text:
Haaye asghar, haay haay asghar
Woe! Asghar; Woe! Asghar
Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”

urdu transliteration text: Royi hu bhare ghar ko, muje tum na rulaana
english translation text: I have wept in front of the whole household; do not make me cry

urdu transliteration text: Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”

urdu transliteration text: Tu bol nahi sakta hai, kya mangega paani
english translation text: You cannot even speak; how will you seek water?

urdu transliteration text: Ay nehr mere laal ko, tu paani pilaana
english translation text: O river! Give my beloved a drink of water

urdu transliteration text: Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”

urdu transliteration text: Talwaar utha sakte nahi, tum mere beta
english translation text: You cannot carry a sword, my son

urdu transliteration text: Tum teer-e-tabassum hi ko hathyaar banaana
english translation text: Let your weapon be the arrow of your smile

urdu transliteration text: Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”

urdu transliteration text: Maydan me barsaat hai teero(n) ki meri jaan
english translation text: Arrows are raining in the battlefield, my love!

urdu transliteration text: Ay laal mere teero(n) se, tum khud ko bachana
english translation text: O my beloved! Save yourself from arrows

urdu transliteration text: Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”

urdu transliteration text:
Aah nad-e-ali dam karoo(n) gardan pe teri mei
Come, let me recite Nad-e-Ali upon your neck
Hai radde balaa ke liye, nuskha ye puraana
english translation text: For this is an old prescription for turning away calamities

urdu transliteration text: Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”

urdu transliteration text: Sunti hu(n) lagaa teer gale par tere beta
english translation text: I have heard that an arrow struck your neck, my son!

urdu transliteration text: Ye zakhme guloo khuld mei, daada ko dikhana
english translation text: In paradise, show your grandfather this wound of your neck

urdu transliteration text: Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”

urdu transliteration text: Maloom tha mujhko ke tumhe pyaas hai kaysi
english translation text: I knew how intensely thirsty you were

urdu transliteration text: Marne ke liye paani ka, karte the bahaana
english translation text: Water was an excuse for you to find death

urdu transliteration text: Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”

urdu transliteration text: "Rehan" dua karta hu(n) nohay ke sile me x2
english translation text: Rehan, I pray that as a reward for this elegy

urdu transliteration text: "Shabbir" ka shaair hi, kahe mujhko zamana
english translation text: I be known in this world as the ‘Poet of Shabbir’

urdu transliteration text: Maa kehti thi asghar mere ghar lawt ke aana
english translation text: The mother would say, “My Asghar, do return home”
